# Bonanza Labs
> Open source AI tools for builders. Video generation, repo health checking, agent payments, webhooks, search, and more.

## Products

### 🩺 Fork Doctor
Repo health checker — 13 automated checks for CI/CD, security, SBOM, Dev Containers, licensing, README quality.
- Free: 5 checks/day, JSON output, public repos
- Pro ($9/mo): Unlimited, all formats, private repos, auto-fix

### 🎬 FrameForge
AI video generator — type a topic, pick a style, get a polished MP4.
- Free: 5 videos/mo, 720p, 2 styles
- Pro ($29/mo): 50 videos, 1080p, all styles, voice cloning

### 💰 Agent Wallet
Policy-based wallets for AI agents. Auto-approve under $X, human approval above.
- Free: 1 agent, $50/mo limit, Solana
- Pro ($29/mo): 10 agents, $5K/mo, all chains, policy editor

### 🤖 Agents
AI agent orchestration framework with built-in tools.
- Free: 1 agent, basic tools, 10 tasks/day
- Pro ($29/mo): 10 agents, all tools, workflows, API

## Quick Start
```bash
pip install fork-doctor
fork-doctor openclaw/openclaw

pip install bonanza-labs[video]
bonanza video "AI Agents" --style viral --format 9:16
```

## Pricing
All tools have free tiers. Paid plans start at $9/mo.
Crypto accepted: USDC/USDT on Solana, Base, BSC.

## Links
- Website: https://bonanza-labs.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/c6zks4gssn-droid
- Docs: https://github.com/c6zks4gssn-droid/bonanza-labs-fork-doctor
